backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the Arena backend with user profiles, content metadata, comments, likes, follow relationships, playback queues, and a messaging system with per-conversation message lists and access control enforcement.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the uploader display name feature (showing artist name instead of raw principal in 'Uploaded by' labels) is implemented with high confidence in ContentDetailPage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, pages, hooks, utilities, and configuration files for the Arena app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used by shadcn-ui components throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'The Arena' and mounting the React root at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Feed, Upload, ContentDetail, UserProfile, Mind, and Messages pages, and conditionally shows the ProfileSetupModal for new authenticated users.
Comments section component that fetches, displays, and allows adding/deleting comments for a content item, resolving each commenter's display name from their user profile via a per-principal query hook.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationDial: Reusable AlertDialog wrapper component for confirm/cancel prompts, supporting destructive and non-destructive styles, a pending/loading state, and customizable labels.
frontend/src/components/ContentCard.tsx: Renders a media content card with thumbnail, file type badge, like/queue/delete actions, and navigation to content detail or uploader profile. Handles audio/video MIME type detection and owner-only delete with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ConversationView: Displays a real-time messaging conversation between the current user and a partner, rendering message bubbles with avatars, timestamps, and read receipts. Supports sending messages and auto-scrolling to the latest message.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileDialo: A dialog form for editing the user's display name, bio, and profile picture, with image preview, removal, and size validation. Submits changes via editProfile and updateProfilePicture mutations.
A drag-and-drop file input component that accepts any file type, displays file name/size with a category-appropriate icon, and exposes the selected file via a callback. Supports clearing the selection and re-selecting the same file.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application shell providing a sticky header with logo, navigation links (including an unread message badge), login/profile controls, and a collapsible queue panel. Detects the currently playing content from the route for queue context.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MediaPlayer.tsx: A React media player component with play/pause, seek, volume, skip, repeat, and prev/next track controls. Renders a progress bar, control buttons, and volume slider with neon-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileMenu.tsx: A dropdown profile menu component that displays the user's avatar/initials and name, and provides options to edit profile, delete account, or log out.
frontend/src/components/QueuePanel.tsx: A slide-in side panel that displays the playback queue, allowing users to reorder, remove, clear, or navigate to items in the queue.
frontend/src/components/ThumbnailCreator: A component for creating media thumbnails either by capturing a frame from a video at a seekable position or by uploading an image file.
Displays a user's public profile card with avatar, bio, follower/following counts, and follow/unfollow/message actions, supporting both own and other users' profiles.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, content, comments, posts, conversations, and playback queue operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines the Arena dark-theme design tokens (CSS custom properties) for both light and dark modes along with utility classes for neon glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContentDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays a single media item's details including a media player, like/queue controls, uploader info, and a collapsible comments section, with owner-only delete functionality.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Page component that renders a browsable feed of all content with filtering by type (all/music/video), sorting by recency or popularity, and a search input, displayed in a responsive grid with a hero banner.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.tsx: Displays a two-panel messaging UI with a searchable conversation list and an inline ConversationView; each row shows the partner's avatar, name, last message preview, and unread badge.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: A modal dialog for first-time profile creation, allowing users to enter a display name, optional bio, and optional profile picture before saving via the saveProfile mutation.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: A form page for uploading audio or video content with title, description, media file, thumbnail, and album cover fields, tracking upload progress and navigating home on success.
frontend/src/pages/UserProfilePage.tsx: Parses a principal string from the URL params and renders the UserProfileView component, showing an error state if the principal is invalid.
frontend/src/pages/WhatsOnYourMindPage.t: A social feed page where authenticated users can create text/image posts, like posts, and add or delete nested comments, with relative timestamps and avatar display.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/videoFrameCapture.ts: Exports a single async function that draws the current frame of an HTMLVideoElement onto a canvas and returns it as a PNG Blob.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Arena frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Outfit, Bebas Neue), OKLCH-based color tokens (including arena-specific neon/dark palette), neon box-shadow utilities, and animation keyframes. Enables dark mode via class, and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 5) for 'The Arena' messaging app, listing existing features and pending feature requests including adding Enter-key send, a visible Send button in ConversationView, and displaying the artist's profile name in the 'Uploaded by' label.
